title: 伏竜Sの後に・隠された水門

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a fantastic performance, Copano
Rickey reaffirms her affinity with dirt. However,
there's no denying that these races fail to attract
much public attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To spread the word of feng shui through dirt
racing, it'll be necessary to first generate
excitement for the races themselves. In order to
do that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll run in the Japanese Derby as part of her
strategy to win turf fans over. This could be a
defining moment in her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, her main focus remains the dirt races.
So, she sets her sights next on the Champions
Cup, where she'll display the power of feng shui
by beating Hokko Tarumae.
